scope_note: QA Engineering Core Cert family [121]: family_extension of QA_CORE_SPEC.v1 proving that any classical engineering system (state-space model, stability conditions, controllability claim) maps validly to a QA specification. Certifies: (EC1-EC5) valid QA mapping of states/transitions/failures/orbit families, (EC6-EC8) classical stability conditions correspond to QA invariant preservation and orbit contraction, (EC9-EC11) classical controllability corresponds to QA reachability with arithmetic obstruction override. Key contribution: EC11 shows that v_p(r)=1 for inert prime p makes a target unreachable even when the classical Kalman rank condition certifies full controllability.
